tables.label: Projects
tables.description: Applets you are building. One row per applet idea, from first spark to shipped.

tables.name: steps
tables.label: Steps
tables.description: The guided build checklist. Every step belongs to a phase (Define, Data, Screens, Feel, Ship) and links to the project it is for.

tables.name: playbook
tables.label: Playbook
tables.description: Short guides explaining each part of applet-making in depth — read alongside the checklist.

tables.description: The design-style gallery: every look an applet can wear, with what it suits and accent colors that pair well.
